name: ${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}
postStartCommand: mkdir -p "$CONAN_HOME" "$XDG_CACHE_HOME"; conan profile path default >/dev/null 2>&1 || conan profile detect --force; profile=$(conan profile path default); if grep -q '^compiler.cppstd=' "$profile"; then sed -i 's/^compiler.cppstd=.*/compiler.cppstd=20/' "$profile"; else sed -i '/^\[settings\]/a compiler.cppstd=20' "$profile"; fi
